title: Figma vs Browser Audit
description: Student receives a Figma mockup and a broken browser implementation. Must identify all discrepancies and prioritise by severity.
npc: Client (Product Owner) — wants everything perfect, doesn't understand technical trade-offs

easy: Button height 44px in Figma, renders 36px in browser
Font weight 600 in Figma, renders 400 (regular) in browser
Primary color #2563EB in Figma, #1D4ED8 in browser
medium: Card grid shows 3 columns on tablet instead of 2
hard: Image lazy loading not implemented — all images load immediately
Focus states missing on interactive elements (accessibility failure)
Font renders differently on Windows vs Mac
